description.G: Symmetric adjacency (undirected); nodes in preorder from Bio.Phylo root.
description.tau: Branching times t_k mapped to [0,1] as (root-to-split cumulative length) / (max root-to-leaf length).
description.p_k: At each binary split, p_left + p_right = 1; mode=length.
description.pi_1_k: Empirical: delta distribution on each leaf sequence (escape variant).
description.x_WT: Wildtype / anchor sequence for BranchSBM (not necessarily a tree node).
